description: The Float2Driver component can be used to drive a foat2 value, based on an X and a Y value.

fields.X: The field that holds the X value for the float2. If null, the X component of the float2 will be 0.
fields.Y: The field that holds the Y value for the float2. If null, the Y component of the float2 will be 0.
fields.Target: The field that is driven to the constructed float2.
